content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 7, 0), (2, 9, 2), (3, 5, 8), (5, 9, 9), (1, 3, 12), (6, 9, 17), (0, 9, 19), (0, 4, 21), (8, 9, 21), (7, 8, 24), (2, 4, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 9.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (3, 7, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 9, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 5, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 9, 9) has node 5 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 12) has node 1 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 9, 17) has node 6 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 4, 21) has node 0 and time 21. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (8, 9, 21) has node 8 and time 21. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 8, 24) has node 7 and time 24. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 29) has node 2 and time 29. -> Add node 4.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 5 at time 9: 5, 9, and 9.

Answer: [5, 9, 9]
